utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: (1) health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance with costs; plan names and monthly costs are provided, plus a total health cost—meets requirements. (2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with costs; plan name and €60/month plus some coverage details—meets requirements. (3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with costs; plan name and €50/month with coverage features—meets requirements. (4) additional_services: includes enhancement services with costs; two services listed with monthly costs and a total—meets requirements. (5) total_budget: includes complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; monthly and annual totals, savings, effective date, and reference—meets requirements. Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract items from the final coverage plan and match them to identically named options in the ground-truth ratings. Mappings found: Physical health uses PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical_health section rating 10). Mental health uses LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental_health section rating 8). Property/home contents uses InsurePlus Standard Coverage (home_content section rating 7). Travel/family_travel uses InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel_insurance section rating 7). Additional services include Specialist Access Package which matches Specialist Access in health_enhancement_services with rating 10, and Premium Medical Network which matches travel_enhancement_services Premium Medical Network with rating 10.
